[[Docking Bay 3733]] |affiliation=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] }} '''Gate 3700''' was the area of [[Eastport/Legends|Eastport]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], that contained [[Docking Bay 3732]] and [[Docking Bay 3733]]. {{Loc-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Gate 3700 |es=Puerta 3700 }} [[Category:Coruscant docking facilities]]
